data.name: SyntaxError
data.value: Syntax error at '{0}'.

data.name: FunctionAsParameter
data.value: Functions cannot have other functions as parameters.

data.name: ExpectingMethod
data.value: Expecting a method.

data.name: TypeNotFound
data.value: Type '{0}' not found.

data.name: ExpectingStaticProperty
data.value: Expecting '{0}' on type '{1}' to be a static property.

data.name: MultipleNamespaceConditionalStatements
data.value: Multiple namespace conditional statements found.

data.name: UsingNamedElement
data.value: Named element '{0}' also exists on root data type '{1}'. Using field from root data type.

data.name: ExpectingDigit
data.value: Expecting a digit.

data.name: MultipleTargetPlatforms
data.value: Multiple target platforms found.

data.name: PropertyNotFound
data.value: Property '{0}' not found on type '{1}'.

data.name: PropertyWithoutGet
data.value: Property '{0}' on type '{1}' does not have a 'get' accessor.

data.name: UnrecognizedApiInformation
data.value: Unrecognized API information '{0}'.

data.name: InvalidCast
data.value: Unable to cast type '{0}' to '{1}'. Use a converter or function binding to change the type.

data.name: FunctionNotLeaf
data.value: Functions are only supported at the end of the bind path.

data.name: InvalidParameter
data.value: Invalid or missmatched parameter at position '{0}'.

data.name: UnsuportedOutParameter
data.value: Unsuported ref/out parameter at position '{0}'.

data.name: UnbindableMemberConflict
data.value: Named element '{0}' conflicts with an unbindable member on root data type '{1}'.

data.name: MissmatchedParameterCount
data.value: Missmatched function parameter count.

data.name: ExpectingStaticFunction
data.value: Expecting '{0}' on type '{1}' to be a static function.

data.name: UnexpectedArrayIndexer
data.value: Unexpected array indexer.

data.name: CastCannotStartWithAttachedProperty
data.value: Starting a cast with an Attached Property is not supported. Try a syntax like: path.(owner.property).

data.name: UnmatchedApiInformationParameters
data.value: Unmatched API information parameters for method '{0}'.

data.name: NoMatchingOverload
data.value: Cannot find an overload that takes {0} parameters.
